title: Sports Club | MBA IB DSE
description:
For all sports enthusiasts, this is where they find a breather. Every sports activity conducted on campus or participated in, by the students is monitered and taken care by this cell.
DSE MBA IB | University of Delhi | MIB | Since 1995
headings: To know more, connect with them
paragraphs: The Sports Club of MBA-IB has a clear purpose- To brighten the lives of the student community through sport activities

We understand that sport is something that gives people the purest form of joy. And all our work is directed towards enhancing and improving the ways of providing this joy. You can read about sport, you can talk about it and you can even write about it, but nothing beats the feeling of actually stepping onto the field and experiencing those sporting emotions for yourself.

Chhatra Marg, Delhi School Of Economics, University Enclave, Delhi-110007
For any complaints against any constituent member of the MBA IB Student Body, Kindly reach out to PRESIDENT@MIBDU.ORG
